title: Method Level 3
summary: Full octave scales, F major, E minor, wider skips, and register contrast to bridge into intermediate reading.

exercises.title: C Scale RH Full Octave
exercises.summary: Right hand C major scale across a full octave.
exercises.goal: Read and play all eight notes of C major evenly.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C Scale LH Full Octave
exercises.summary: Left hand C major scale across a full octave.
exercises.goal: Read and play C major in bass clef over one octave.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: F Major RH
exercises.summary: Right hand F major five-finger pattern with B-flat.
exercises.goal: Play F major with an accurate B-flat.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: F Major LH
exercises.summary: Left hand F major five-finger pattern in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Navigate F major with B-flat in the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: E Minor RH
exercises.summary: Right hand E natural minor five-finger pattern.
exercises.goal: Recognize the minor sound through the E minor position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Sixth Skips RH
exercises.summary: Right hand reading with leaps of a sixth.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Scale Run in Eighths
exercises.summary: Ascending and descending C major in continuous eighth notes.
exercises.goal: Keep eighth notes even across a full octave run.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Waltz in F Major
exercises.summary: A flowing waltz melody using the F major position.
exercises.goal: Play F major in three-four time with a smooth phrase.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Register Contrast
exercises.summary: Alternating phrases in high and low registers.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Broken Chord Melody
exercises.summary: A melody built from broken C and G major triads.
exercises.goal: Connect broken chord notes into a smooth melodic line.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Melody
exercises.summary: An expressive melody in A natural minor.
exercises.goal: Feel and play the natural minor colour across a phrase.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Mixed Rhythm Melody
exercises.summary: A melody combining halves, quarters, and eighths freely.
exercises.goal: Switch note lengths smoothly within a longer phrase.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Octave Melody
exercises.summary: Left hand melody spanning a full octave in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Read a full octave passage fluently in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level Three Review
exercises.summary: A phrase drawing on F major, skips, and octave range.
exercises.goal: Apply Level 3 skills: flat key, wide skips, and eighth runs.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level Three Finale
exercises.summary: A complete melody combining C major, A minor, and F major colours.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate fluent reading across three key areas.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
